steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that regional sports at past Olympics appeared as onetime showcases. The second sentence then provides specific examples: kaatsen (a regional sport) appeared only at the 1928 Olympics, while handball (international) became a permanent medal event. The transition word must signal how these examples follow logically from the pattern just established.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Accordingly means as a result or therefore, which correctly captures how the examples follow logically from the established pattern. The other three don't capture this relationship: Moreover adds information, Granted concedes a point, and However suggests contradiction. That matches choice B — B is correct.
